title: Closing Price Stage B Omni Generation Record
description: Reproducible provenance record for a single Omni generation run. Introduced in Stage B PR1 as additive groundwork.

generation_id.description: Stable unique identifier for this generation run.

element_set_id.description: Element set used as input context for this run.

instruction_text_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the instruction text used for this run, for reproducibility auditing.

model.description: Generation model identifier (e.g. kling, runway, pika).

model_version.description: Specific version string of the model used.

duration_seconds.description: Duration of the generated output in seconds.

native_audio.description: Whether the generation includes native model-generated audio.

seed.description: Generation seed for reproducibility. May be integer or string depending on model.

cfg_scale.description: Classifier-free guidance scale used for this run.

negative_prompt.description: Negative prompt text applied during generation.

output_refs.description: Relative paths or identifiers for output files produced by this run.

credit_cost.description: Credits or API units consumed by this generation run.

rejection_reasons.description: Human-readable reasons this output was not selected, if applicable.

selection_status.description: Outcome of the review process for this generation.

created_utc.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when this generation was produced.
